name: QUERN, DIRECTOR, DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC AID OF ILLINOIS, et al. v. MANDLEY et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in QUERN, DIRECTOR, DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC AID OF ILLINOIS, et al. v. MANDLEY et al. (436 U.S. 725, 1977 Term).
